info.title: LangChain.Cli
info.description: Command Line Interface to run some LangChain tasks.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CLI tool to use LangChain for common tasks

options.name: --tools
options.description: Tools you want to use - Filesystem, Fetch, GitHub, Git, Puppeteer, SequentialThinking, Slack, Figma, DocumentConversion. You can specify toolsets using square brackets, e.g., github[issues].

options.name: --directories
options.description: Directories you want to use for filesystem. [default: System.IO.DirectoryInfo[]]

options.name: --model
options.description: Model to use for commands. [default: o3-mini]

options.name: --provider
options.description: Provider to use for commands. [default: OpenAi]
